title: cosmo_fate: A preregistered fragility audit of DESI-era cosmic-fate claims
description: Major-revision pipeline and audit archive for "Is cosmic fate an inference or an assumption?" Includes the frozen preregistration, one hundred exact-LCDM null mocks, archived thin chains sufficient for reported summaries, induced-prior and in-window-fit audits, the registered constraint-horizon audit, and the post-hoc A-004 structural No-Go for matched-prior importance reweighting. Differentiates the fate verdict along dataset, prior, inference-statistic, and w(a)-grammar axes while preserving the compressed-CMB and finite-mock evidence boundaries.
